# freeloancalc.app

> Free online loan calculator with amortization schedule, interest breakdown, extra payment analysis, and 15 international currencies. No signup, no ads, no data collection.

## Key Facts
- 100% browser-based — no server, no database, no data transmission
- Supports USD, EUR, GBP, CHF, CAD, AUD, JPY, INR, BRL, MXN, SEK, NOK, DKK, PLN, THB
- Real-time calculation as you type — no "Calculate" button needed
- Full month-by-month amortization schedule with CSV export
- Extra monthly payment modeling with savings display
- Loan presets: 30yr mortgage, 15yr mortgage, 5yr auto, 3yr personal, 10yr student
- Progressive Web App — works offline
- Dark mode support
- Part of the Freesuite collection at freesuite.app

## Features
- Monthly payment calculation using standard amortization formula
- Total interest and total paid over the life of the loan
- Payoff date projection
- Donut chart showing principal vs interest breakdown
- Amortization schedule with payment, principal, interest, and remaining balance columns
- Extra payment analysis: interest saved and months shaved off
- Currency selector with locale-appropriate number formatting
- CSV export of full amortization schedule
- Responsive design for desktop, tablet, and mobile

## Pages
- [Home](https://freeloancalc.app/) — Main loan calculator tool
- [vs Bankrate](https://freeloancalc.app/vs-bankrate) — Comparison with Bankrate's calculator
- [vs NerdWallet](https://freeloancalc.app/vs-nerdwallet) — Comparison with NerdWallet's calculator
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://freeloancalc.app/mortgage-calculator) — Mortgage-specific guide and calculator
- [Auto Loan Calculator](https://freeloancalc.app/auto-loan-calculator) — Car loan payment calculator
- [Student Loan Calculator](https://freeloancalc.app/student-loan-calculator) — Student loan repayment calculator

For the complete text content of all pages, see [llms-full.txt](https://freeloancalc.app/llms-full.txt).
